data.content:
Branch: worktree-foolery-cd5e-watchdog-logs
Commit: d860589a
Summary: added structured watchdog console.log events for arm and dispose cancellation, preserving the existing timeout fire behavior. Tests now assert armed/cancelled logs include the watchdog tag, pid=77777, and timeoutMs=50, and assert dispose emits no cancel log after the watchdog has already fired.
Verification: bun run lint; bun x tsc --noEmit (bunx unavailable in this shell); bun run test; bun run build.
